seoTitle: Chapel Hill vs Charlestown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chapel Hill and Charlestown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Chapel Hill vs Charlestown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chapel Hill and Charlestown.
heading: Chapel Hill vs Charlestown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chapel Hill, Queensland and Charlestown, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charlestown has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Chapel Hill (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chapel Hill or Charlestown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chapel Hill has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Charlestown scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chapel Hill scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Charlestown scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chapel Hill or Charlestown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charlestown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
